description: Java entity class representing an audit event, mapped to the 'audit_event' database table, used for persisting audit log data with fields like event type, user ID, outcome, and timestamp.

classes.name: AuditEvent
classes.description: Entity class for audit log records, with fields for event details, user info, outcome, and timestamp.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the audit event.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the audit event.

methods.name: getEventType
methods.description: Returns the type of the event.

methods.name: setEventType
methods.description: Sets the type of the event.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the user associated with the event.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the user.

methods.name: getCorrelationId
methods.description: Returns the correlation ID for related events.

methods.name: getIpAddress
methods.description: Returns the IP address associated with the event.
